iran_nuke.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). No change. 440kg 60% HEU under IAEA monitoring. Iran has material for 9 weapons if further enriched. Araghchi rejects ceasefire/negotiations. No diplomatic path. No nuclear test. Breakout capability intact.

iran_conventional.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). Europe REJECTS Hormuz military involvement — Trump coalition push fails. Israel preparing for another month of war. Iran FM: 'not seeking ceasefire but war must end.' Simultaneous Israeli strikes on Tehran + Beirut continue. US Embassy Baghdad most intense assault yet. Brent ~$103.

israel_lebanon.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). European leaders warn against major Israeli ground offensive. Hezbollah rocket attack wounds 4 in north Israel. 31 Hezbollah attacks claimed in 24h. IDF says Iran strikes degrading Hezbollah arming capability. Israel says displaced Lebanese won't return until Israeli citizens safe. Israel preparing for another month of war.

turkey.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 92 (stable). NATO alliance fracturing further — Europe rejects Hormuz military involvement. NATO still considering Patriot PAC-3 at Incirlik. 3+ Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkey. Iranian refugees flooding in. Missile debris in Dortyol, Hatay.

india.notes: Day 20 05:00 - ELEVATED 25 (stable). India evacuating nationals from ME. Diplomatic balancing act. Pakistan-Afghanistan war next door increasing regional pressure. No direct escalation signals.

russia.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 87 (stable). Russia continues arms support to Iran. Ukraine peace talks frozen. NATO fracturing over Hormuz benefits Russia strategically. No direct ME intervention yet. Missile intercepts over Turkey add NATO-Russia tension vector.

china.notes: Day 20 06:00 - CRITICAL 42 (stable). No major new signals. China special envoy mediating Pak-Afg ceasefire (week-long, no result). Trump delays China visit. Hormuz coalition precondition for Xi summit now shelved. Blockade rehearsals ongoing.

north_korea.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 78 (stable). 10 MRL missiles fired March 14 during US-SK drills. Kim observed with daughter. No new provocations in past 24h. Exploiting US security gap in ME. Monitoring for follow-up tests.

russia_ukraine.notes: Day 20 06:00 - IMMINENT 100 (rising). Russia daytime Kyiv drone attack kills 4, damages Qatari embassy. 250 Ukrainian drones intercepted over Moscow in biggest attack in a year. Ukrainian FP-2 drones hit fuel train in Crimea + arms depot in Donetsk. 6 killed by Russian missiles Saturday. Peace talks dead.

pakistan_afghanistan.notes: Day 20 05:00 - IMMINENT 100 (stable). Kabul hospital strike: 400 killed, 250 injured (Afghan claim). Pakistan denies, says hit military targets only. UNSC unanimously condemns terrorism from Afghanistan. Fighting enters 3rd week — border clashes kill 4 (2 children) in Khost. China special envoy spent week mediating, urges ceasefire. Pakistan declared "open war." October Qatar ceasefire completely collapsed. Gulf mediators (UAE/Qatar) bogged down in own war. No off-ramps in sight per Atlantic Council.

top_signals: Europe rejects military involvement in Strait of Hormuz — Trump coalition push fails
Israel preparing for at least another month of war in Iran + Lebanon
Russia daytime Kyiv drone attack kills 4, Qatari embassy damaged
250 Ukrainian drones intercepted over Moscow — biggest attack in a year
US Embassy Baghdad hit by rockets + 5 drones — most intense assault since war began
Iran FM: 'not seeking ceasefire but war must end' — refuses negotiations
European leaders warn against major Israeli ground offensive in Lebanon
Kabul hospital strike: 400 killed — UNSC condemns Afghan terrorism
NATO considering Patriot PAC-3 at Incirlik over Iranian missile threats
Total ME death toll: 2,000+ (Iran 1,444, Lebanon 886+, US 13, Gulf 20+)
Trump threatens to 'take' Cuba — monitoring new conflict vector

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: STABLE (Day 19 00:00): ZERO de-escalation signals across all theaters. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike is worst single event of that conflict. Iran FM explicitly rejects ceasefire. China mediating Pak-Afg is only diplomatic signal but no ceasefire materialized. All conflicts intensifying.

latest_news.headline: European leaders reject military involvement in Strait of Hormuz
latest_news.text: European leaders push back against Trump's demand for NATO allies to help secure Strait of Hormuz. Major blow to Hormuz coalition hopes. Trump chastises nations for lack of 'enthusiasm.'

latest_news.headline: Israel preparing for at least another month of war
latest_news.text: Report: Israel preparing for at least another month of military operations. IDF chief Eyal Zamir says strikes on Iran affecting Hezbollah's ability to arm and fund itself. 4 wounded in Hezbollah rocket attack on northern Israel.

latest_news.headline: Russia daytime drone attack on Kyiv kills 4, damages Qatari embassy
latest_news.text: Russia struck Kyiv in rare daytime drone attack. 194 of 211 drones downed. Debris crashed on main square. 4 killed, building housing Qatari embassy damaged. Separate: Ukrainian FP-2 drones hit fuel train in Crimea and arms depot in Donetsk.

latest_news.headline: Trump threatens to 'take' Cuba amid island-wide power crisis
latest_news.text: Trump threatens to 'take' Cuba amid island-wide power crisis. Cuba has not received oil shipments since early January amid US pressure, worsening humanitarian crisis. Not yet tracker-worthy but monitoring.

latest_news.headline: Rockets and 5+ drones hit US Embassy in Baghdad — most intense attack since war began
latest_news.text: Rockets and at least 5 drones launched at US Embassy in Baghdad Green Zone. One drone crashed inside compound. Black smoke rising. Iraqi air defenses engaged. Described as most intense assault since conflict began. Kataib Hezbollah commander previously killed March 14.

latest_news.headline: Israel launches simultaneous extensive strikes on Tehran and Beirut
latest_news.text: IDF announces simultaneous waves of 'extensive strikes' on Tehran (regime infrastructure) and Beirut (Hezbollah infrastructure). Dual-front offensive. Iran Red Crescent clinic damaged.

latest_news.headline: NATO considering Patriot PAC-3 deployment at Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: NATO considering reinforcing missile defense at Incirlik with Patriot PAC-3 system (replacing current Spanish PAC-2). Kurecik radar in Eastern Anatolia — closest early-warning to Iran — likely target of intercepted missiles. Bloomberg: intercepted missiles are 'messages for Turkey.'

latest_news.headline: Russia strikes Kyiv in rare daytime drone attack, debris crashes on main square
latest_news.text: Russia launched rare daytime drone attack on Kyiv. 194 of 211 drones downed. Debris crashed on main square. Different drone types targeting central Kyiv. Unusual timing.

latest_news.headline: Ukraine launches biggest drone assault on Moscow in a year — ~250 intercepted
latest_news.text: Moscow claims ~250 Ukrainian drones intercepted over 2 days on approach to capital. Biggest drone attack on Moscow in a year. Ukrainian FP-5 Flamingo missiles also hit Votkinsk Machine Building Plant in Udmurtia.

latest_news.headline: Kabul hospital strike: 400 killed, Pakistan denies — 'crime against humanity'
latest_news.text: Afghanistan says Pakistan airstrike on Omar Addiction Treatment Hospital (2000-bed) killed 400, injured 250. Pakistan denies targeting hospital, claims military installations only. Taliban calls it 'crime against humanity.' Fighting enters 3rd week. Border clashes kill 4 including 2 children.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20 06:00) — Global war probability 100%. Day 20 of Iran war. Europe flatly rejects Hormuz coalition — Trump's alliance-building effort failing. Israel signals another month of war minimum. Iran FM refuses ceasefire but says 'war must end.' Russia-Ukraine drone war escalating (daytime Kyiv attack + 250 drones on Moscow). Russia kills 4 in Kyiv, damages Qatari embassy. NATO fracturing over Turkey/Hormuz. Pakistan-Afghanistan hospital strike aftermath — no ceasefire. All primary theaters at IMMINENT. Zero de-escalation in any theater. Brent ~$103.
